description: Step1: Clean your wall,Make sure the object surface flat smooth and dry.Step2: Measure and cut the wallpaper to the required size.(There are grid lines on the back of the wallpaper,easy to operate)Step3: Peel a few inches of wallpaper from the backing,Stick from the top. (Do not peel off all the backing paper at once and not to pull or stretch the wallpaper too hard or the pattern will be not align)Step4: Using a craft knife and smoother,smoothing the material to the wall and pushing out any air bubbles.trim excess from the top and bottom.Warm Tips:* For best results, clean, dry and smooth all surfaces. Product will not adhere to unclean or textured surfaces. Make sure the surface is completely dry before applying product to it.* There may be slight color difference under different screens
